## Findings
- [ ] **[BLOCK][Coverage] Coverage regression from v0.14.0**
  - **Status quo:** Overall coverage dropped from 68.6% to 68.2% (delta -0.4%).
  - **Likely cause:** New features added without corresponding tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for new code paths to restore coverage baseline.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go`

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage below default threshold**
  - **Status quo:** Overall coverage is 68.2%, below the 80% default threshold.
  - **Likely cause:** No hard coverage gate configured in CI.
  - **Proposed solution:** Consider adding coverage gate or improving test coverage.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage`
